title: eryngium biebersteinianum
intro: Eryngium biebersteinianum, also known as Raisin Mary or Eryngo, is a perennial plant that belongs to the caraway or carrot family (Apiaceae) and is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Eryngium biebersteinianum include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties. Eryngium biebersteinianum can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
